nameplate.purpose: Fraunces 900 masthead wordmark. Centered, with heavy rule below.

deck.purpose: Fraunces light italic standfirst under the masthead.

headline.purpose: Fraunces 600 — each act's title. Display only, never UI.

reading.purpose: Newsreader — plain-language summary and act prose only.

kicker.purpose: Inter 600 uppercase — issuing body, section bar, flags, date dividers.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns and dialogs only. Stories and date sections use rules, never shadow.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, selection).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Most UI state changes; users are in a task.

components.name: Nameplate
components.description: The masthead wordmark, centered Fraunces 900 with a heavy rule below.
components.html:
Diário da República · Série INovo a cada dia útil
O que mudou
components.css: .ds-masthead { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-masthead__kicker { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.012 80); font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); } .ds-masthead__name { display: block; padding: 20px 0; text-align: center; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 3.25rem; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.23 0.012 60); text-decoration: none; } .ds-masthead__rule { border-top: 2px solid oklch(0.23 0.012 60); }

components.name: Section link (active)
components.description: Domain filter as a newspaper section bar; active link is ink with an under-rule.
components.css: .ds-section { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); text-decoration: none; } .ds-section:hover { color: oklch(0.23 0.012 60); } .ds-section--active { color: oklch(0.23 0.012 60); border-bottom: 2px solid oklch(0.23 0.012 60); padding-bottom: 2px; } .ds-section__count { font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 400; text-transform: none; color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); }

components.name: Provenance flag — Verified
components.description: Top of the provenance ladder. Uppercase flag: icon + word + color.
components.html: verificado
components.css: .ds-flag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-flag--verified { background: oklch(0.93 0.05 150); color: oklch(0.35 0.10 150); }

components.name: Story entry (act)
components.description: A ruled register story: kicker (issuing body) → Fraunces headline → Newsreader standfirst → flags + source. No card, no shadow.
components.html:
Presidência do Conselho de Ministros

Decreto-Lei n.º 123/2026

não revisto

Alarga o apoio ao arrendamento a agregados com rendimentos até ao 4.º escalão, com efeitos a partir de 1 de julho.

habitaçãofonte oficial
components.css: .ds-story { padding: 20px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.84 0.012 80); } .ds-story__head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-story__kicker { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.09em; color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); } .ds-story__title { margin: 6px 0 0; font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.375rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-story__title a { color: oklch(0.23 0.012 60); text-decoration: none; } .ds-story__title a:hover { color: oklch(0.46 0.12 255); } .ds-story__standfirst { margin: 10px 0 0; max-width: 70ch; font-family: Newsreader, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.23 0.012 60); } .ds-story__foot { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; } .ds-story__foot a { color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); text-decoration: none; } .ds-story__foot a:hover { color: oklch(0.46 0.12 255); } .ds-tag { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(0.45 0.014 65); background: oklch(0.925 0.011 85); border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 6px; } .ds-flag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-flag--unreviewed { background: oklch(0.93 0.06 80); color: oklch(0.42 0.11 60); }

narrative.overview: A daily paper for the law. Warm newsprint stock, a high-contrast serif nameplate, hairline rules between stories, and a kicker over every headline naming who issued it. Every story is a diploma from Diário da República, Série I; the standfirst beneath each headline is the plain-language summary. A product surface dressed as editorial, it serves citizens and journalists, and earns trust the way a paper of record does — sourced kickers, a visible última verificação, a refusal to oversell. A signpost, not an authority.
keyCharacteristics: Warm newsprint paper, never pure white; a warm evening-edition dark.
Fraunces display headlines, Newsreader reading prose, Inter furniture.
Stories are ruled, not carded — hairline dividers, kicker -> headline -> standfirst.
Color is a signal, never decoration — reserved for the three provenance flags.
Built for reach: large serif headlines, 17px prose, auto light/dark, full keyboard paths.

rules.name: The Signal-Only Rule
rules.body: Saturated color is forbidden as decoration. If a colored element is not a link, a primary action, a focus state, or a provenance flag, its color is a bug.

rules.name: The Colour-Is-Never-Alone Rule
rules.body: Every provenance flag pairs a hue with an icon and a word. Remove the color and the state must still be unambiguous.

rules.name: The Headlines-Are-Fraunces Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is display only — nameplate, deck, headlines. Never set body or a control in Fraunces; never set a headline in Inter.

rules.name: The Ruled-Not-Carded Rule
rules.body: Stories are separated by hairline rules, not boxed in cards. A resting card with radius and shadow in the feed is wrong.

dos: Do keep the page in ink, muted, and rule until an element earns color — a link, a primary action, focus, or a provenance flag.
Do set headlines in Fraunces, reading prose in Newsreader, everything else in Inter.
Do divide stories with hairline rules; open date sections and the nameplate with the heavy rule-strong.
Do render every provenance flag as icon + word + color, surviving with color removed.
Do hold muted text at >=4.5:1 on paper; never let a grey go faint.
Do size for reach: >=44px controls, 17px reading prose, visible focus rings, reduced-motion fallbacks, respect prefers-color-scheme.
Do keep the official source and the última verificação date visible on every act.
donts: Don't box stories in rounded cards with shadows — rules divide; the page is flat.
Don't reintroduce default Phoenix scaffold (orange #FD4F00 pill, logo, @elixirphoenix / GitHub links).
Don't use a pure-white body — the stock is warm newsprint; don't push it into saturated AI cream (chroma <= ~0.012).
Don't use corporate-SaaS gradients, hero metrics, or glassmorphism.
Don't signal urgency like a news site — no breaking-news red, no countdowns, no alarm.
Don't use the Portuguese flag's green/red as identity; status green is a provenance signal.
Don't put a colored border-left stripe on a story — full-width hairline rules only.
Don't set a headline in Inter or a control/label in Fraunces.
